title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech compares code generation capabilities across tools and explores whether Google engineers are effectively adopting or benefiting from AI-assisted coding in 2024-2026. The video discusses code generation practices at Google and contrasts OpenAI and Claude's code generation approaches.
